title: cnicus callosus
intro: Cnicus callosus, also known as Rough Hawk's Beard or Rough Cnicus, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Cnicus callosus include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Cnicus callosus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
